# openGLPixelFormat()

**Instance Method**

Returns the OpenGL pixel format used by the view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func openGLPixelFormat() -> NSOpenGLPixelFormat!
```

## Return Value

An `NSOpenGLPixelFormat` object.

## Discussion

This pixel format as a read-only object. Do not attempt to change any of its settings.

## Working With OpenGL

- **openGLContext()**: Returns the OpenGL context used by the view.
